ab: i Amsing ku ’aliyan, alrak a Pinuyumayan.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Amsing，他也是卑南族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Amsing, and he is also an Pinuyumayan child.

ab: mukasa mi temakesi kana dekalr i Kasavakan.
en: We study together in the Kasavakan tribe.

ab: malayas mi mukasa kingkinger datu vinavati na dawdawan da vativatiyan, sayhuwan mi lra kinger da tinaraKasavakan na vativatiyan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會聽建和語故事了。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Kasavakan proficiently.

ab: alusu ku di valivaliw ku, i Amsing mu, tihasar di marekedang.
ch: 我很矮也很瘦，Amsing很高又很壯。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Amsing is short and thin.

ab: i Amsing mu, salaw dalikedik di sidalu da cau, sahar na cau diya kantaw.
ch: Amsing健康對人又非常熱心，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Amsing is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
